details.reasoning: The implementation fully meets all rubric requirements: (1) INIObject.zig contains properly structured create/parse/stringify functions accepting JSGlobalObject and returning JSValue; (2) parse function correctly handles sections ([section] syntax), key=value pairs with value coercion (booleans, null, numbers), and comments (both ; and #), including CRLF line endings; (3) proper wiring in BunObject.zig with lazy property callback, getINIObject function, and imports; (4) C++ exports header includes INI macro entry; (5) C++ BunObject.cpp has hash table entry for the lazy property callback; (6) comprehensive TypeScript definitions with namespace INI containing parse/stringify signatures and examples; (7) implementation is self-contained without external npm INI parser dependency; (8) code follows Zig conventions with jsc.JSFunction.create, ZigString.static, and proper imports; (9) comprehensive test coverage including parsing variants, value coercion, stringify behavior, circular reference detection, error cases, and roundtrip testing. No significant gaps or issues detected.
